Import from MLS Feed
The app ships with a snapshot of the full CB Select feed. To refresh with the latest listings, paste an updated XML here.

1. Open your feed URL in a new tab, select all (Ctrl/Cmd-A), copy (Ctrl/Cmd-C).
2. Paste the XML here and click Parse.
Open feed in new tab ↗
